description: Three MCP tools: fetch_page, fetch_pages_batch, search_web. Ad-free Markdown for AI agents.
name: io.github.yubinkim444/ai-first-scraper-mcp

environmentVariables.description: URL of the ai-first-scraper instance to use. Default: https://ai-first-scraper.onrender.com
environmentVariables.name: SCRAPER_URL

environmentVariables.description: URL of the ai-first-search instance to use. Default: https://ai-first-search.onrender.com
environmentVariables.name: SEARCH_URL

environmentVariables.description: Upstream HTTP timeout in seconds. Default: 45
environmentVariables.name: AFS_TIMEOUT

title: AI-First Scraper
